domains.name: Software Engineering
domains.description: Core software development disciplines spanning frontend, backend, mobile, and general-purpose engineering.

domains.name: Data & AI
domains.description: Data engineering, machine learning, analytics pipelines, and AI/LLM application development.

domains.name: DevOps & Infrastructure
domains.description: Cloud platforms, CI/CD, containerization, infrastructure-as-code, and platform engineering.

domains.name: Security & Compliance
domains.description: Cybersecurity engineering, penetration testing, compliance frameworks, and threat intelligence.

domains.name: Design & Product
domains.description: UI/UX design, product management, growth, content creation, and creative media.

domains.name: Quality & Testing
domains.description: Software quality assurance, automated testing, performance benchmarking, and debugging workflows.

domains.name: Hardware & Science
domains.description: Embedded systems, robotics, scientific computing, FPGA, and domain-specific engineering.

categories.name: Frontend Development
categories.description: Web UI, browser-facing applications, component libraries, and client-side frameworks.

categories.name: Backend Development
categories.description: Server-side applications, REST/GraphQL APIs, microservices, and distributed systems.

categories.name: Mobile Development
categories.description: iOS, Android, and cross-platform mobile application development.

categories.name: AI Agent Engineering
categories.description: LLM-powered agents, multi-agent orchestration, RAG systems, and AI workflow automation.

categories.name: ML & Data Science
categories.description: Machine learning models, statistical analysis, data pipelines, and scientific computing.

categories.name: Data Engineering
categories.description: ETL pipelines, data warehousing, databases, and analytics infrastructure.

categories.name: Cloud & Infrastructure
categories.description: Cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure), infrastructure-as-code, and platform services.

categories.name: DevOps & CI/CD
categories.description: CI/CD pipelines, containerization, orchestration, and deployment automation.

categories.name: Security Engineering
categories.description: Application security, vulnerability research, red/blue teaming, and security tooling.

categories.name: Compliance & Governance
categories.description: Regulatory compliance, security auditing, risk management, and governance frameworks.

categories.name: UX & Design
categories.description: User experience design, visual design, design systems, and prototyping.

categories.name: Product Management
categories.description: Product strategy, roadmapping, growth, and cross-functional coordination.

categories.name: Content & Documentation
categories.description: Technical writing, documentation, SEO, localization, and content production.

categories.name: QA & Test Automation
categories.description: Test frameworks, end-to-end automation, contract testing, and regression detection.

categories.name: Performance & Reliability
categories.description: Load testing, performance profiling, SLO management, and reliability engineering.

categories.name: Embedded & Robotics
categories.description: Embedded systems, FPGA, robotics, real-time control, and hardware interfacing.

categories.name: Scientific Computing
categories.description: Scientific workflows, simulations, physics/chemistry modeling, and research automation.

roles.name: React Developer
roles.description: Builds interactive web applications using React and its ecosystem. Specializes in component architecture, state management, and React performance patterns.

roles.name: Frontend Engineer
roles.description: Develops web UIs with strong command of HTML, CSS, JavaScript/TypeScript, and modern build tooling. Covers accessibility, responsive design, and cross-browser compatibility.

roles.name: Node.js Backend Developer
roles.description: Builds server-side applications and APIs using Node.js and associated frameworks. Focuses on REST/GraphQL API design, middleware, and server performance.

roles.name: Python Backend Developer
roles.description: Develops backend services and APIs using Python frameworks. Works with Django, FastAPI, or Flask for web services and integrates databases and async patterns.

roles.name: Full-Stack Developer
roles.description: Works across the entire web stack from UI to database. Familiar with both frontend frameworks and backend APIs, with strong skills in integration and deployment.

roles.name: iOS Developer
roles.description: Develops native iOS and macOS applications using Swift and SwiftUI. Manages App Store publishing, device APIs, and Apple platform integrations.

roles.name: Android Developer
roles.description: Builds Android applications using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose. Handles Google Play publishing, Android SDK, and Kotlin-idiomatic patterns.

roles.name: AI Agent Engineer
roles.description: Designs and implements autonomous AI agents and multi-agent orchestration systems. Specializes in LLM tool-calling, subagents, MCP integration, and agent memory/state management.

roles.name: LLM & Prompt Engineer
roles.description: Crafts and optimizes prompts, evaluations, and inference pipelines for large language models. Works on prompt chaining, system prompts, and fine-tuning workflows.

roles.name: RAG & Knowledge Engineer
roles.description: Builds retrieval-augmented generation pipelines and knowledge bases. Specializes in vector databases, embedding models, chunking strategies, and semantic search.

roles.name: Machine Learning Engineer
roles.description: Builds and deploys machine learning models from experimentation to production. Covers model training, evaluation, feature engineering, and ML infrastructure.

roles.name: Data Scientist
roles.description: Analyzes data to derive insights and builds predictive models. Uses statistical methods, visualization, and experimentation to drive data-informed decisions.

roles.name: Data Engineer
roles.description: Designs and maintains data pipelines, warehouses, and ETL processes. Works with distributed data systems and ensures reliable data availability for analytics.

roles.name: Database Engineer
roles.description: Designs, optimizes, and manages relational and NoSQL databases. Covers schema design, query optimization, migrations, and database reliability.

roles.name: Cloud Architect
roles.description: Designs and governs cloud infrastructure across AWS, GCP, and Azure. Focuses on scalability, cost optimization, multi-region resilience, and cloud-native services.

roles.name: DevOps Engineer
roles.description: Builds and maintains CI/CD pipelines and automated deployment workflows. Bridges development and operations to accelerate software delivery.

roles.name: Platform Engineer
roles.description: Builds internal developer platforms and golden paths for engineering teams. Works on tooling, self-service infrastructure, and developer experience.

roles.name: Site Reliability Engineer
roles.description: Ensures system reliability, availability, and performance through observability, incident response, and SLO/SLI engineering.

roles.name: Security Engineer
roles.description: Designs and implements security controls for applications and infrastructure. Focuses on secure coding, SAST/DAST tooling, authentication, and hardening.

roles.name: Penetration Tester
roles.description: Conducts offensive security assessments including network, web, and Active Directory penetration testing. Uses red-team tactics to identify exploitable vulnerabilities.

roles.name: SOC / Blue Team Analyst
roles.description: Monitors, detects, and responds to security incidents using SIEM platforms and threat intelligence. Performs log analysis, forensics, and incident response.

roles.name: Compliance & Security Auditor
roles.description: Assesses organizational compliance with security standards such as ISO 27001, SOC 2, HIPAA, and GDPR. Manages audit programs and risk registers.

roles.name: Cryptography Engineer
roles.description: Implements and analyzes cryptographic protocols, key management, and secure communication systems. Works on encryption, PKI, and protocol security.

roles.name: UX / UI Designer
roles.description: Creates user-centered designs, wireframes, and prototypes. Works with design systems, accessibility standards, and user research to deliver polished interfaces.

roles.name: Product Manager
roles.description: Defines product vision, roadmaps, and success metrics. Coordinates engineering, design, and business stakeholders to deliver customer value.

roles.name: Growth & Marketing Specialist
roles.description: Drives user acquisition, retention, and revenue through data-driven marketing, SEO, and growth experiments.

roles.name: Technical Writer
roles.description: Produces clear technical documentation, API references, changelogs, and developer guides. Covers localization, content strategy, and docs-as-code workflows.

roles.name: Creative Media Producer
roles.description: Creates video, audio, and animated media content. Works with video editing tools, motion graphics, and programmatic media pipelines.

roles.name: QA Automation Engineer
roles.description: Designs and implements automated test suites spanning unit, integration, and end-to-end layers. Manages test coverage, flakiness, and CI integration.

roles.name: E2E & Browser Automation Engineer
roles.description: Builds end-to-end and browser automation workflows using Playwright, Selenium, or CDP. Covers web scraping, visual regression, and test orchestration.

roles.name: Performance Engineer
roles.description: Analyzes and optimizes system performance under load. Uses profiling, benchmarking, and load testing tools to identify and resolve bottlenecks.

roles.name: Embedded Systems Engineer
roles.description: Develops firmware and software for embedded systems including microcontrollers, FPGAs, and real-time operating systems.

roles.name: Robotics Engineer
roles.description: Builds robotic systems including control algorithms, simulation environments, and sensor integration. Works with ROS and behavior trees.

roles.name: Scientific Computing Engineer
roles.description: Automates scientific workflows across physics, chemistry, biology, and aerospace domains. Uses numerical computing libraries and domain-specific tools.

roles.name: App Store & Publishing Specialist
roles.description: Manages App Store Connect and Google Play publishing workflows including screenshots, metadata, TestFlight, and release automation.

roles.name: Developer Tooling Engineer
roles.description: Builds CLI tools, developer workflows, plugins, and internal tooling to improve engineering productivity. Works on code generation, linting, and automation scripts.

roles.name: MCP & Integration Engineer
roles.description: Builds and integrates Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers and tools to extend AI agent capabilities with external systems and APIs.

roles.name: Web3 & Blockchain Developer
roles.description: Develops smart contracts, DeFi protocols, and blockchain integrations. Works with Solidity, Web3 libraries, and decentralized infrastructure.

roles.name: 3D & Graphics Engineer
roles.description: Creates real-time 3D graphics, WebGL experiences, and interactive visualizations. Works with Three.js, shaders, and game engine paradigms.
